fernao-gomes.name: Fernão Gomes
fernao-gomes.title: Portuguese Spice Merchant
fernao-gomes.description: A wealthy Portuguese trader who deals in exotic spices. He's lost his trading seal.

dialogue.greeting: Ah, a visitor! Welcome to my humble stall. I am Fernão Gomes, purveyor of the finest spices from the Moluccas.

seal.text: My trading seal! It's gone missing. Without it, I cannot authorize shipments. A disaster! I last saw it three days ago...

spices.text: Cloves, nutmeg, cinnamon - treasures worth more than gold! The Dutch and English would kill for these trade routes.

melaka.text: This city is the crossroads of the world. Arabs, Chinese, Malays, Indians - all come here to trade. But Portuguese law keeps order.

pirates.text: Pirates? Bah! They are a menace to honest trade. My last shipment was delayed a month because of their attacks on the shipping lanes.

dialogue.farewell: May São Tomé protect you on your journey.

capitao-rodrigues.name: Capitão Rodrigues
capitao-rodrigues.title: Fortress Guard Captain
capitao-rodrigues.description: The stern captain of A Famosa's garrison. He takes his duty seriously.

dialogue.greeting: State your business. This is A Famosa, the pride of Portuguese Melaka.

seal.text: Gomes' seal? Security matter. I've heard nothing of thieves, but I keep watch. Perhaps check with the Chinese - they notice everything.

fortress.text: Built in 1511 by Afonso de Albuquerque himself. These walls have never fallen. They never will, not while I command.

duty.text: A soldier's duty is clear: protect Portugal's interests, maintain order, and keep the trade flowing. Everything else is noise.

pirates.text: Pirates? Yes, we've had reports. Bring me specifics - where they were sighted, what ships - and I'll dispatch patrols. We cannot have lawlessness in Portuguese waters.

padre-tomas.name: Padre Tomás
padre-tomas.title: Jesuit Priest
padre-tomas.description: A kind Jesuit missionary who ministers to Portuguese settlers and seeks converts.

dialogue.greeting: Peace be with you, my child. What brings you to St. Paul's?

seal.text: Theft is a grave sin. I heard Gomes mention his troubles after Mass last Sunday. He seemed... distracted. Perhaps guilt weighs on someone?

faith.text: We bring the light of Christ to these distant shores. Many souls have been saved, though the work is never complete.

melaka.text: This city is a testament to God's providence. So many peoples, so many faiths. Yet we must all seek truth.

pirates.text: Even pirates have souls, my child. Though their actions are sinful, we must pray for their redemption. Violence begets only more violence.

aminah.name: Aminah
aminah.title: Malay Market Vendor
aminah.description: A sharp-eyed Malay woman who sells produce and knows all the market gossip.

dialogue.greeting: Selamat datang! Fresh mangoes today - best in Melaka!

seal.text: Ah yes, Senhor Gomes is very worried. I saw a Chinese man near his stall that day - well-dressed, from the merchant guild perhaps?

market.text: This market has been here longer than the Portuguese. My grandmother sold here, and her grandmother before that.

gossip.text: People talk to fruit sellers. We hear everything! Just yesterday, I heard about the Capitão's new boots - very expensive!

pirates.text: The fishermen from kampung have been talking. They say they saw a strange ship anchored in a hidden cove to the south. Maybe you should ask there?

chen-wei.name: Chen Wei
chen-wei.title: Chinese Guild Representative
chen-wei.description: A dignified Chinese merchant who represents the interests of the Chinese trading community.

dialogue.greeting: 你好. Welcome. How may the guild be of service?

seal.text: Yes, I know of Gomes' seal. A... misunderstanding. The seal was taken as collateral for a debt. 50 cruzados. Pay this, and it shall be returned.

guild.text: We Chinese have traded in Melaka for centuries. The Portuguese are new here. We... accommodate each other.

debt.text: Business is business. Gomes borrowed for a spice venture that failed. The seal ensures payment. This is proper.

pirates.text: The guild has lost two junks this season to pirates. We would pay handsomely for information leading to their capture. Perhaps... 100 cruzados?

rashid.name: Rashid
rashid.title: Arab Sailor
rashid.description: A jovial Arab sailor with wild stories and a quick laugh.

dialogue.greeting: As-salamu alaykum, friend! Care to hear a tale? I have sailed from Aden to Canton!

seal.text: Ha! The Portuguese merchant? I saw him arguing with Chen Wei last week. Voices raised, very heated! Something about money and honor.

stories.text: Once, off the coast of Sumatra, we fought a Chinese pirate junk! Twenty men against fifty! We prevailed through cunning and prayer!

travels.text: I have seen wonders - the markets of Calicut, the pearl divers of Bahrain, the silk factories of Canton. But Melaka? Melaka is special.

pirates.text: Pirates! Yes, friend, I have seen them! Three days ago, sailing past the southern islands. A black-sailed junk with red flags. They watched us but did not attack - our dhow is too fast, alhamdulillah!

dialogue.farewell: Ma'a salama! May fair winds find you!
